ModInfo.description:
Shrines don't found or spread Paganism
Removes Religion Spread and Religion Opinion stats from all Shrines (and Acolytes), so that they can be built without having to worry about keeping one more Religion happy.
Hinduism is also removed since it's founded by Shrines.
If any Shrine is present in a City, you still get the 2 Culture per Turn even without the Religion.
By being unable to found Pagan Religions, Events that require them will be disabled. Divine Rule: Since Pagan religions won't exist, you can't adopt them as a State Religion.
Dynasty Akhenaten's Altar is an exception and remains.
ModInfo.author: Fimbulvetr
